evaluation.summary: Gap variances in high-order primorial bases increase with size and follow a (log P_k)^{1.17} scaling, contradicting earlier claims of collapse to zero.
next_directions: Extend the analysis to higher-order primorials using even higher precision to verify the scaling law.
Perform a rigorous error analysis to quantify uncertainties in the variance estimates.
Compare the observed scaling with alternative theoretical models and explore connections to number-theoretic functions.
